# UniversalCrawlerProplus

> Windows desktop media crawler workstation (`ucrawl` / v3.6.17): PyQt6 GUI, FastAPI Web UI, CLI/SDK/AI Skill, Playwright spiders, and unified download scheduling across Douyin, Xiaohongshu, Bilibili, Kuaishou, and MissAV.

Prefer current guides under `docs/guides/` and practices under `docs/engineering/` over dated reports. Shared runtime contracts live in `shared/`; do not reintroduce deleted dual copies such as `cli/runner.py` or `app/controllers/session_mixin.py`. Test placement follows `tests/AGENTS.md` (eight directory-driven suites).

## Entry points

- [main.py](main.py): process launcher for GUI / Web / CLI / test modes
- [entry/dispatcher.py](entry/dispatcher.py): startup mode routing
- [entry/gui_entry.py](entry/gui_entry.py): desktop GUI bootstrap
- [entry/web_entry.py](entry/web_entry.py): Web UI / portal bootstrap
- [entry/cli_entry.py](entry/cli_entry.py): CLI bootstrap
- [cli/main.py](cli/main.py): `ucrawl` command entry
- [cli/__init__.py](cli/__init__.py): public SDK exports and module aliases
- [cli/skill/SKILL.md](cli/skill/SKILL.md): AI Skill contract for LLM-driven crawl/download

## Core modules

- [app/config/settings.py](app/config/settings.py): ConfigManager singleton and runtime settings
- [app/controllers/application_controller.py](app/controllers/application_controller.py): desktop application orchestration
- [app/ui/main_window.py](app/ui/main_window.py): PyQt6 main window shell
- [app/web/controller.py](app/web/controller.py): Web UI controller and session host
- [app/services/frontend_state_service.py](app/services/frontend_state_service.py): GUI/Web shared frontend snapshots and deltas
- [app/spiders/base.py](app/spiders/base.py): spider runtime, navigation helpers, crawler guardrails
- [app/core/download_manager_core.py](app/core/download_manager_core.py): download dispatch and semaphore core
- [shared/controller_session.py](shared/controller_session.py): unique download/session state machine for GUI and Web
- [shared/cli_runner_runtime.py](shared/cli_runner_runtime.py): unique CLIRunner used by CLI, SDK, and Web search
- [shared/sdk_runtime.py](shared/sdk_runtime.py): `UcrawlSDK` implementation
- [shared/localization.py](shared/localization.py): shared i18n / locale helpers for GUI and Web

## Documentation

- [docs/README.md](docs/README.md): documentation hub and maintenance rules
- [docs/guides/architecture.md](docs/guides/architecture.md): system architecture and frontend adapter boundaries
- [docs/guides/development.md](docs/guides/development.md): local development and validation workflow
- [docs/guides/config.md](docs/guides/config.md): config files, hot reload, GUI/Web settings contract
- [docs/guides/api.md](docs/guides/api.md): REST, WebSocket, and frontend state service notes
- [docs/guides/testing.md](docs/guides/testing.md): test launcher, suites, and verification strategy
- [docs/guides/packaging.md](docs/guides/packaging.md): PyInstaller and release packaging
- [docs/guides/ai-skill-guide.md](docs/guides/ai-skill-guide.md): AI Skill integration guide
- [docs/cli/cli-guide.md](docs/cli/cli-guide.md): CLI usage
- [docs/cli/python-sdk-guide.md](docs/cli/python-sdk-guide.md): Python SDK usage
- [docs/cli/rest-api-reference.md](docs/cli/rest-api-reference.md): CLI/REST API reference
- [docs/engineering/frontend-refresh-and-concurrency.md](docs/engineering/frontend-refresh-and-concurrency.md): EventBus, refresh coalescing, concurrency, and backpressure
- [docs/engineering/settings-ui-contract.md](docs/engineering/settings-ui-contract.md): settings controls, theme/language, and i18n contract
- [docs/engineering/spider-async-pipeline.md](docs/engineering/spider-async-pipeline.md): async crawl/parse/enqueue pipeline baseline
- [docs/update.md](docs/update.md): secure update bootstrap, trust anchors, and signing

## Agent rules

- [tests/AGENTS.md](tests/AGENTS.md): test suite roots, naming, markers, and change workflow
- [docs/engineering/README.md](docs/engineering/README.md): index of current recommended engineering practices
- [docs/guides/README.md](docs/guides/README.md): index of architecture, API, config, and packaging guides

## Tests

- [tests/launcher.py](tests/launcher.py): directory-driven suite launcher (`python tests/launcher.py --list`)
- Full suite: `python -m pytest`
- Focused spider/download checks: `python -m pytest tests/unit/app/spiders/test_base.py tests/unit/app/core/downloaders/test_manager_core.py -q`
- Focused GUI/Web checks: `python -m pytest tests/unit/app/ui/test_main_window.py tests/unit/app/ui/test_update_scheduler.py tests/contract/web/test_fastapi_endpoints.py -q`
- Startup smoke: `python main.py`

## Optional

- [docs/reports/2026-06-28-signal-runtime-acceptance.md](docs/reports/2026-06-28-signal-runtime-acceptance.md): historical signal/refresh acceptance; prefer the engineering practice doc above
- [docs/postmortems/README.md](docs/postmortems/README.md): incident postmortem index
- [docs/postmortems/clear-queue-409-freeze.md](docs/postmortems/clear-queue-409-freeze.md): clear-queue freeze root cause and fix
- [docs/postmortems/missav-surrit-hls-403-local-proxy.md](docs/postmortems/missav-surrit-hls-403-local-proxy.md): MissAV HLS proxy postmortem
- [docs/reviews/README.md](docs/reviews/README.md): architecture and Qt frontend review index
- [docs/references/ui-skills.md](docs/references/ui-skills.md): external GUI/WebUI reference repos (upstream links)
- [docs/changelog.md](docs/changelog.md): version changelog
